login.text: We start with secure access and a demo-ready login to show the workflow end to end.

dashboard-overview.text: This dashboard is the command center for care gap visibility and action.

hero-patient.text: Maria Garcia represents a high-impact care gap scenario with immediate outreach potential.

intervention.text: Outreach, scheduling, and follow-up are captured in one workflow to close care gaps faster.

quality-impact.text: Measure performance updates as care gaps close, revealing the quality impact instantly.

technical.text: Real-time monitoring demonstrates that services are actively processing patient data.

summary.text: AI-guided recommendations highlight next-best actions and explain why they matter.
